raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad to Egipteu Tau-
ta augſchann ne nahks/ pahr kux-
xeem Leetus ne nahk. Tad buhs
ta Mohziba pahr teem/ar ko tas
KUNGS tohs Pagaxus moh-
zihg/ kas augſchain ne nahks
tohs Leeewenu-Swehtkus turreht."
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schis buhs teem Egipte-
reem par Grehlu/ un wiſſeem
Pagaxeem par Grehlu/kas aug-
scham ne nahks tohs Leeewenu-
Swehtkus turreht."
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai Deena buhs us teem
Sirgu Swahrquteeni (raſ-
ſtihts) TA SWEHTIBA
TA KUNGA/ un tee Pohdi ta
KUNGA Ramna buhs ka tee
flazzinaſjaini Tranſi preekſch ta
Altara."
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo wiſſi Pohdi eekſch Je-
rusalemes un Juhda buhs tam
KUNGAM Zebaot twehti / ta
ka wiſſi / kas uppureht gribb /
nahks/ un no teem xems/ un
eekſch teem wahrihs/ untai Dee-
ua ne kahds Kananiteris wairs
buhs eekſch ta Namna ta KUN-
GA Zebaot.
Ta Praueeta Zakarijus Gals."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Chi irr ta D
ko tas Kl
runnaja u
fraelu zaur
lakiju."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es mihtoju juhs/
tas KUNGS: Bet juhs fa
Ar ko tu muhs mihto?
Eesaws irr Jehkaba Bra
fakka tas KUNGS: Tome
mihtoju Jehkabu."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Eesawu eenthstu es
esmu winna Kalnus par po
Weetu darrijs/ un winna een
tojamu Teefu preekſch teem P
keem Tuſſnesi."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un jeptchu Gedoms fo
tu : Mehs effim famaitati /
mehr mehs gribbam tahs poh
Weetas attak uhſtaifiht/
takka tas KUNGS Zebaot
Ja tee uhſtaifibs/ tad es no
ſitchu/ un tee taps nofaukti D
deewibas Rohbescha/ un Laud
pahr ko tas KUNGS irr
ſkuitess muhscham."
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhsas Azzie to redſe
un juhs fazziteet : Lat tas KUN
irr pa-augſtinahts/ tahtaki ne
Israeka Rohbeschab."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weenam Dehtam bul
fawu Tehwu gohdahrt / un we
nam Kalpatn fawu Kungu.
mu es tad juhfu Tehws/ kur i
mans Gohds? Un efmu es juhf
Rungs/ kur irr manna Bibja
ſchana ? fakka tas KUNGS Be
vaot uhs junis Preestereem
manna Wahrdn Nizzinatajem"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
